summary: Task Auto-Generation feature testing complete - All 16 tests passed. The feature auto-creates tasks from request lifecycle events (request_created, status_changed_to_doing, status_changed_to_review, revision_requested, delivered). Templates are seeded correctly, video-specific templates fire only for video category requests, dedup prevents duplicates, and no pool/routing language is present.
critical_code_review_comments: Task generator uses synchronous await calls (not background tasks) - good for immediate availability but could slow down order creation for complex template sets
Service ID resolution in _resolve_service_id() uses string matching on category names and titles - may need refinement for production edge cases
SEED_TEMPLATES are inserted on first call to ensure_seed_templates() - works correctly but no admin UI to manage templates yet
seed_data_creation: 22 test orders created with prefix TEST_ during testing (not cleaned up - use MongoDB to delete if needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task auto-generation fully tested. Templates endpoint returns 9 templates (admin-only). Order creation triggers request_created tasks. Pick order triggers status_changed_to_doing tasks. Video category with '60s' or 'youtube' in title triggers video-specific templates. Graphic design requests get only default templates. Dedup works correctly.

POST /api/orders auto-generates tasks.auto_generated_tasks_correct_fields: PASS (title, visibility, task_type, trigger_event, template_id, created_source=system)

verified_features.templates_collection: 9 seed templates (2 default request_created, 2 video-specific, 1 doing, 1 review, 2 revision, 1 delivered)
verified_features.template_fields: id, service_id, trigger_event, title_template, visibility, task_type, assign_target_type, due_offset_hours, active
verified_features.task_fields: template_id and trigger_event present in auto-generated tasks
